ops.title: Hosted serving lane: one serve abstraction (athome), vLLM-Modal backend dark-launched, 9B promoted through the hosted gate; local 8B stays default
ops.description: Follow-on from the 2026-07-19 serving decision (see the decision note + task f32fee09 for all evidence). Build, in order: (1) athome serve layer grows a hosted vLLM backend as one more composable recipe (Modal app: CUDA-devel base, PINNED vLLM version, base Qwen/Qwen3-8B rev b968826d + unfused LoRA via --enable-lora, bf16, GPU memory snapshots targeting ~70s cold starts, scale-to-zero, OpenAI-compatible; declarative config, never a parallel subsystem) — coordinate operator-idle on the athome tree; (2) cc-steer drafter backend abstraction: an HTTP sibling of drafter_mlx consuming any OpenAI-compatible endpoint with an EXPLICIT timeout (the current drafter path has none — a hanging endpoint must fail-open to no-steer, never stall the eval loop indefinitely), selected via config with mlx remaining the default; (3) hosted threshold calibration: any hosted promotion scores the frozen frame THROUGH the endpoint and fits thresholds on those probs (spike measured local fires 9 vs hosted 26 at the same cutoff — substrate-specific by construction); (4) fresh-epoch 9B watcher retrain (~$10-15 Tinker under cap) promoted through the hosted gate, registered as the hosted lane's model — LOCAL KEEPS 8B and stays the active default; the switch to hosted is a separate deliberate operator action (resurface the privacy note then). Spike artifacts to reuse: /tmp/cc-steer-modal-spike/ (modal_app.py, scorer with exact sentinel semantics, tokenizer cross-check) — copy into the repo lane before /tmp evaporates.

ops.text: athome serve exposes the hosted vLLM backend via declarative config; local rapid-mlx and hosted satisfy the same contract
cc-steer drafter selects backend by config with an explicit HTTP timeout; mlx remains default; endpoint-down fails open to no-steer with a visible log line
hosted promotion path scores the frozen frame through the live endpoint and fits substrate-specific thresholds; 9B candidate promoted through it into the hosted registry lane
local daemon still serves 8B by default after the build lands; the hosted switch is documented as a deliberate config action with the privacy note
